title: GitLab の 500 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article provides accurate and up-to-date information on GitLab 500 errors, covering common causes and practical troubleshooting steps.
It correctly identifies official resources like status.gitlab.com and relevant log files for self-managed instances.
The recommended actions align with official GitLab documentation and best practices, posing low risk when followed by an administrator.
absolute wording may overstate technical certainty

sources.title: Architecture · Development · Help - GitLab
sources.claim: GitLab uses Puma as the web server and Sidekiq as a job queue, relying on Redis for background job information.

sources.title: Logs · Administration · Help · GitLab - The Costa Group
sources.claim: For Omnibus GitLab, production logs are typically found at /var/log/gitlab/gitlab-rails/production.log and Sidekiq logs at /var/log/gitlab/sidekiq/current.

sources.title: Omnibus GitLab logs
sources.claim: The `/etc/gitlab/gitlab.rb` file can be used to configure log directories, and `gitlab-ctl reconfigure` is used to apply configuration changes.

sources.title: Log system - GitLabドキュメント
sources.claim: For Omnibus GitLab installations, some Sidekiq logs are in /var/log/gitlab/sidekiq/current.

sources.title: GitLab System Status
sources.claim: status.gitlab.com is the official status page for monitoring GitLab.com and its associated services.

sources.title: There are many ways to contact Support, however, the first step for most people should be to search the Knowledge Base or documentation. - GitLab Support
sources.claim: GitLab support requests can be opened via the GitLab Support Portal.

sources.title: Troubleshooting GitLab running in a Docker container
sources.claim: When troubleshooting GitLab in a Docker container, you can read container logs using `sudo docker logs gitlab`.

sources.title: GitLab Architecture #GitLab - Tech Blog - クリエーションライン
sources.claim: GitLab's core components include Puma (for Web UI and API), Sidekiq (for asynchronous processing), Gitaly (for Git repository management), PostgreSQL (for project/group data), and Redis (for job queues and cache).

sources.title: クリエーションライン GitLab日本語サポート ドキュメント
sources.claim: Accessing GitLab functions like repositories, pushes, and merge requests can become unavailable due to 500 errors.

sources.title: 500 Internal Server Error when configuring security scans via UI with branch name push rules enabled (#564973) · Issue - GitLab
sources.claim: A 500 Internal Server Error indicates an unexpected internal error on the GitLab server side and can manifest as a '500 Internal Server Error' message or an API response with status 500.

sources.title: トラブルシューティング - GitLab Docs
sources.claim: For detailed debugging, refer to the official troubleshooting documentation at https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/administration/troubleshooting/.

sources.title: 再起動したらGitlabが500エラーのままかえってこなくて焦った - ytooyamaのブログ
sources.claim: Loss of database connection can cause GitLab 500 errors.

sources.title: GitLabで特定のリポジトリだけ500エラー - Qiita
sources.claim: `gitlab-rails/production.log` is a key log file for detailed error information.

sources.title: Gitalyのトラブルシューティング - GitLab Docs
sources.claim: Corruption of Git objects in the repository can lead to 500 errors during repository read/write operations.

sources.title: GitLab Pagesの管理のトラブルシューティング
sources.claim: `gitlab-ctl reconfigure` should be executed to apply changes to `/etc/gitlab/gitlab.rb`.

sources.title: Dockerコンテナで実行されているGitLabのトラブルシューティング
sources.claim: If operating GitLab with Docker containers, check application logs with `docker logs <container-id>`.

sources.title: GitLab - ArchWiki
sources.claim: Issues with Redis settings can contribute to 500 errors.

sources.title: Where does GitLab omnibus store ci log files? - DevOps Stack Exchange
sources.claim: External storage settings, like for job artifacts, can be configured in `/etc/gitlab/gitlab.rb` and issues could lead to errors.

sources.title: gitlab Error 500 after updating when viewing projects - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: GitLab's configuration file (`/etc/gitlab/gitlab.rb`) having errors or incomplete settings after an upgrade can lead to frequent 500 errors. Database migration issues after an upgrade can also lead to 500 errors.

sources.title: File: README — Documentation by YARD 0.9.37 - Sign in · GitLab
sources.claim: `/etc/gitlab` holds configuration files for Omnibus GitLab, and `/var/log/gitlab` contains all log data.

sources.title: GitLab社のGitLab Supportの利用にお問い合わせ元の事前登録が必要になります #GitLab - Tech Blog｜クリエーションライン
sources.claim: For GitLab.com paid plans, pre-registration of contacts is required to open support tickets.

sources.title: Error 500, log says MISCONF Redis, cannot persist on disk, requires restart - GitLab
sources.claim: Redis cache configuration issues can lead to 500 errors.

sources.title: Error 500 after each upgrade since 18.2.0 (migrations not running automatically) - GitLab
sources.claim: Syntax errors or invalid values in the configuration file can be detected when running `gitlab-ctl reconfigure`, and failed reconfigurations after an upgrade can lead to 500 errors.

sources.title: Gitlab が管理設定を変更しようとすると HTTP エラー 500 を返す - Reddit
sources.claim: Incorrect configuration file settings can lead to 500 errors.

sources.title: Gitlab がダウンした : r/gitlab - Reddit
sources.claim: Temporary GitLab infrastructure failures can cause requests to fail with a 500 error.

sources.title: 高可用性ロール - GitLab Docs
sources.claim: GitLab installations include PostgreSQL, Redis, Puma, and Sidekiq services.

sources.title: Sidekiq MemoryKiller - GitLabドキュメント
sources.claim: Sidekiq is used to process background jobs in GitLab.

sources.title: Linuxパッケージのインストールに関するトラブルシューティング - GitLab Docs
sources.claim: If keywords like "ActiveRecord", "Errno", "Connection refused" are found in the logs, that is often the root cause of the problem.

sources.title: Internal Server Error 500 while accessing $GITLAB/admin/runners - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: `gitlab-ctl reconfigure` applies configuration changes, and `gitlab-ctl restart` restarts services.

sources.title: Increase startup limit interval for Puma and Sidekiq systemd services for self-installed instances (!132627) · Merge requests - GitLab
sources.claim: Puma and Sidekiq are key services in GitLab that can crash, leading to 500 errors.

sources.title: 2024-04-08: 500 errors when accessing repositories (#17790) · Issues - GitLab
sources.claim: Temporary infrastructure failures (e.g., Gitaly nodes issue) can lead to 500 errors impacting Git, Web, and API for projects.

sources.title: 500 Internal Server Error when viewing pipeline details page (#571511) · Issue - GitLab
sources.claim: 500 Internal Server Errors can occur when accessing specific project pages, such as pipeline details.

unsupported_claims: クライアント側の問題ではなく、GitLabのインフラストラクチャまたはアプリケーションレイヤーで何らかの処理に失敗した状態です。
これはハードウェア障害、不正なシャットダウン、ファイルシステムエラーなどに起因することがあります。
Gitオブジェクトの整合性をチェックするには、GitLabサーバーのシェルにアクセスしてリポジトリディレクトリに移動し、`git fsck --full` コマンドを実行します。
500エラーが頻繁に発生する場合は、GitLabのアップグレード、インフラの増強、またはサポートコントラクトの購入を検討する価値があります。
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.
Optional improvement: Consider adding a note about pre-registered contacts for GitLab.com paid support requests, as this is a recent policy change (though the general support URL is correct).
Optional improvement: Soften absolute claims unless they are directly sourced.
Optional improvement: Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.
